channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [OpenAI] awesome-llm-apps
item.description:
📉 Rank: #7 → #8 (↓1)
Collection of awesome LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.
Language: Python
Category: OpenAI Stars: 105,250 | Forks: 15,365

item.title: [OpenAI] markitdown
item.description:
📈 Rank: #8 → #7 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 102,702 → 105,487 (+2,785)
Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
Language: Python
Category: OpenAI Stars: 105,487 | Forks: 6,611

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 151,576 → 153,100 (+1,524)

Language: JavaScript
Category: LLM Stars: 153,100 | Forks: 23,747

item.title: [Claude] ui-ux-pro-max-skill

item.title: [AGI] magic
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
Magicrew. The first open-source all-in-one AI productivity platform (Generalist AI Agent + Workflow Engine + IM + Online collaborative office system)

item.title: [AGI] ARC-AGI

item.title: [AGI] big-AGI
item.description:
📉 Rank: #7 → #8 (↓1)
AI suite powered by state-of-the-art models and providing advanced AI/AGI functions. Includes AI personas, AGI functions, world-class Beam multi-model chats, text-to-image, voice, response streaming, code highlighting and execution, PDF import, presets for developers, much more. Deploy on-prem or in the cloud.
Language: TypeScript
Category: AGI Stars: 6,911 | Forks: 1,570

item.title: [AGI] open-infra-index
item.description:

Production-tested AI infrastructure tools for efficient AGI development and community-driven innovation

item.title: [AGI] BlackFriday-GPTs-Prompts
item.description:

List of free GPTs that doesn't require plus subscription

item.title: [AGI] awesome-chatgpt-zh
item.description:
📉 Rank: #4 → #5 (↓1)
ChatGPT 中文指南🔥，ChatGPT 中文调教指南，指令指南，应用开发指南，精选资源清单，更好的使用 chatGPT 让你的生产力 up up up! 🚀
Language: Python
Category: AGI Stars: 11,521 | Forks: 941

item.title: [AGI] casdoor
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #4 in AGI
An open-source AI-first Identity and Access Management (IAM) /AI MCP & agent gateway and auth server with web UI supporting OpenClaw, MCP, OAuth, OIDC, SAML, CAS, LDAP, SCIM, WebAuthn, TOTP, MFA, Face ID, Google Workspace, Azure AD
Language: Go
Category: AGI Stars: 13,342 | Forks: 1,632
